title: Auto Streaming Multi-Monitor Integration
summary: Integration between Talos alarm workflow and Salvo video display with multi-monitor and auto-stream toggles

items.title: Talos-Salvo Alarm Workflow Integration
items.body: When a motion alarm is assigned, the alarm workflow automatically opens in Talos and the corresponding alarm quad loads in Salvo. Different toggle combinations control behavior: multi-monitor only, autostream only, or both enabled.

items.title: Zone-Based Alarm Handling
items.body: Burglar alarms handle zone configurations from both GCX and Talos. When an alarm includes zone data, the system matches against GCX zone configurations to stream only relevant sensors. Unmatched or missing zones fall back to site-level streaming.

toggleCombinations: Both auto stream and multi-monitor enabled
Both autostream and multi-monitor set off
Two salvo scenario with mixed toggles
